events.summary: C6 Phase 0 (Research) initialized. Research.md authored (12 sections, ~360 lines). Scope: replace fixed PPL with user-defined custom programs. Data model: customPrograms[] + customDay + exerciseSlot with exerciseID reference. 4 starter templates (PPL/UL/FB3/Empty). NO destructive migration — fixed PPL stays as fallback. Depends on C3 (PR #573) shipping exercise library picker. Out-of-scope guards (8 explicit). 8 new training_-prefixed analytics events. Phase 4 LoC estimate ~1700. Phase E compliant. 4-6 person-days effort.

Phase 0 (Research) approved (operator: 'continue with D1, C6 and C3'). Phase 1 PRD at docs/product/prd/training-program-customization.md (~550 lines). C3 picker-mode dependency RESOLVED via C3 PRD Surface 1. FROZEN: 4 templates / opt-in snapshot migration / 3 override fields / 7 days per program / picker-mode init signature. 6 surfaces. 8 new training_-prefixed analytics events. 7 new + 8 modified source files. Phase 4 LoC est ~1700. 6 success metrics T1/T2/T3 + 5 kill criteria + 8 OQ resolved. Phase 4 GATED on C3 reaching implement-complete.

Phase 1 PRD approved (operator: 'continue c6'). Phase 2 Tasks at .claude/features/training-program-customization/tasks.md — 15 discrete tasks T1-T15 with dependency graph + LoC est ~1965 total. 9-commit Phase 4 landing order: T1+T2+T3 infra > T4+T5 resolver+analytics > T6 list > T7 new-sheet > T8+T9 sub-sheets > T10 editor (C3 picker) > T11+T12 wires > T13+T14 pbxproj+tests > T15 case-study. ~5-7h estimated. Phase 4 BLOCKED on C3 PR #573 merging to main OR operator approves stub-picker workaround.
